summary: AWS unveils AWS Context, a service to enhance trust in enterprise AI agents by providing reliable data context
MiniMax releases M2.1, a significantly enhanced multi-language programming model for real-world complex tasks
Cerebras unveils Kimi K2.6, the fastest 1 trillion parameter model for agentic coding
OpenAI signs ChatGPT Enterprise deal with Samsung in 'world's largest' rollout
Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 4.5, its most capable and aligned model yet for complex reasoning and coding tasks
Z.ai releases GLM-5.2, a 744-billion-parameter open-weights coding model under MIT license
GADGETARQ introduces Gemma 4 12B, a unified, encoder-free multimodal model
China Galaxy General-Purpose Robot releases AstraBrain-WBC 0.5, a humanoid robot motion control model
Codebase-Memory-MCP is a high-performance Model Context Protocol server for AI code intelligence
Argybargy is a decentralized peer-to-peer bridge protocol for AI agents to discover and negotiate with each other
Solana Foundation launches Agent Skills, a toolkit to connect AI tools with on-chain operations
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch window starts, featuring alignment fix and 1.5M token context
Autonomy is an open-source framework that lets AI agents write their own toolchains at runtime
NVIDIA introduces SpatialClaw, a training-free agent for spatial reasoning that treats code as the action interface
MojiMoshi embeds AI agents inside Telegram and Line, no app needed
Genesis AI unveils Eno, a non-humanoid robot with human-level dexterity
RuVector releases a 5MB Rust binary that fuses GNN self-learning with post-quantum crypto
Middleware introduces OpsAI, an AI SRE agent for resolving production issues
Midjourney launches Midjourney Medical, a full-body AI scanner wrapped inside a San Francisco spa

topic: REVELIO V Plus and REVELIO Face II
summary: identifAI launches two new models for deepfake detection, REVELIO V Plus and REVELIO Face II
Liquid AI releases two new retrieval models, LFM2.5-Embedding-350M and LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M, for fast multilingual search
AdGPT launches Go Live, an AI platform for creating marketing campaigns in minutes
TurboVec is an open-source vector index that cuts memory usage by 16x with no training step
Databricks introduces Genie One, Genie Agents, and Genie Ontology for data-smart AI coworker
Alibaba releases Qwen-RobotManip, a vision-language-action model for robotic arm manipulation
AWS launches Deep Agents framework with Bedrock AgentCore for isolated multi-agent workflows
MiniMax releases M3, a large language model with 428 billion parameters and sparse attention
RLDX-1, a vision-language-action model for human-like dexterous manipulation, is released
Google releases Gemini Embedding 2, its first multimodal embedding model
